question: Which exact thresholds, severities, maximum count, and deterministic tie-breakers should govern Attention Items without becoming prescriptive advice or notification policy?
context: PRD must define a small built-in threshold catalogue, severity vocabulary, hard maximum count, and stable tie-breakers. A pre-plan owner-only evaluation must show zero false high-severity items; any unsupported threshold or delivery behavior is excluded or belongs to CHANNELS.
